blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,909 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.4" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 3" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
